name: ai-slop
description: Catches AI slop in any prose and adds a scientific layer for empirical software engineering papers (voice and tense, statistical reporting per APA/IEEE/ACM, citations) and a LaTeX layer (BibTeX verification, reference checks against CrossRef/DBLP, citation macros, grounding comments) — both load automatically for .tex source, and --scientific opts a non-LaTeX manuscript into the scientific layer. Combines these with the community-maintained AI-trope catalog at tropes.fyi.
